rules_text:
Mind 1 [i](You must spend at least 1 mind mana to play this card.)[/i]
{1}, Exert, Exert X items you control: Attack X. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose X health. If they chose a card they control, remove X endurance counter from it.)[/i]
